name: Sekolah Pelita Bangsa

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Perumahan Citra 5 No.1 Blok A.5, Kalideres, Jakarta Barat, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Parents say Pelita Bangsa is a practical option for West Jakarta families who want Cambridge qualifications without the premium price tag.
paragraphs: Parents say Pelita Bangsa is a practical option for West Jakarta families who want Cambridge qualifications without the premium price tag.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$2.2K – US$5.9K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Science laboratories, Libraries, Sports facilities.
